since_last: 26% of 85 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +0.11%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 26% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.57% · BTC -0.97% · Gold +0.49% · Nasdaq100 -1.89%. 26% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +0.11%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +0.11%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.89%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MGNI is the standout at +10.51%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +10.51%, INOD +8.31%, SPCX +6.49%, TLN +4.95%, DLR +2.88%. Laggards: SNAP -9.11%, MRVL -7.73%, KLAC -6.97%, INTC -6.81%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +6.49% at $205.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +6.49% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
